Course Progress1 / 16
Lesson

Drawing Your First Triangle

12 min

Recommended flow

Read the concept, inspect the live demo, open the editor when code is mentioned, then validate the exercise before moving to the next lesson.

Instructions

The Preview panel shows a single red triangle. The vertex shader positions the corners using a hard-coded array; the fragment shader returns a constant red color.

Tip

Try editing the red value in the fragment shader to change the triangle color.
